thought: I need to analyze what cellular process allows a nanobody-payload conjugate to be internalized into hepatic cells even when the targeted orphan receptor does NOT canonically induce endocytosis. Key clues: (1) the receptor is on hepatic cells, (2) the researcher was trying to determine if the receptor triggers a "phagocytosis-like process," (3) the PI says receptor identification doesn't matter and canonical endocytosis induction isn't required.
